endpoints.name: Staff of the Magus cycle (five WUBRG common-artifact lifegain staves from Magic 2014)
Staff of the Death Magus (M14, B)
Staff of the Sun Magus (M14, W)
Staff of the Wild Magus (M14, G)
Staff of the Flame Magus (M15 reprint, R)
Staff of the Mind Magus (M15 reprint, U)

description: Edgelord stepped aside. Mr. Nodeley apologizes for the inconvenience, sir — five cards, Wizards-designer-coordinated, one per WUBRG color, all five trivia-passed, parallel-construction flavor mottos, single-artist (Daniel Ljunggren) coverage across all five BBL-corpus printings, and a perfect sibling-shape to the existing ktk-clan-banner-cycle and ktk-clan-charm-cycle precedents in the same character layer. Drawing 1:1 edges between the cards would have meant ten redundant bullets all pointing at an absent center — Mr. Nodeley thought you'd prefer the cycle node, sir. Fifth full corpus cycle of its kind. He hopes it's not too much trouble.
citations: [Scryfall: `s:m14 t:artifact name:staff` returns five results at consecutive collector numbers 219-223]
[Scryfall: m15/233, m15/234 reprint pages confirming partial M15 reprint of Flame and Mind only]
[In-corpus: all five card-MD Cycle membership trivia bullets enumerate the five-card cycle with M14 collector numbers]
[BBL-corpus-verified: artist field on all 5 cards = Daniel Ljunggren]

node_proposed.rationale: Five-card WUBRG cycle, 5/5 in corpus across mixed printings (3x M14 + 2x M15 reprints), all 5 trivia-passed, all 5 Daniel Ljunggren art per BBL-corpus-verification, Wizards-canonical via Scryfall cohort query and parallel-construction flavor-motto convention. Architectural twin to ktk-clan-banner-cycle (also Ljunggren single-artist, common-artifact, M-set-era cycle) and ktk-clan-charm-cycle (same KTK template at uncommon tier). Pure stack topology — five cards converging on one anchor.

frontmatter_field_added: characters: [staff-of-the-magus-cycle] on all 5 corpus members (block YAML form per wave-92 list discipline)

other_candidates_considered.candidate: Sliver tribal cohort node (2 newly-trivia'd Slivers + 3 corpus slivers — Lavabelly Sliver MH3-207, Toxin Sliver PLST-84, Winged Sliver Tempest-106 — total 5 slivers in corpus)
other_candidates_considered.verdict: Viable cohort candidate (5+ corpus members crosses the implicit ≥3 threshold) but secondary to the Staff cycle in this wave. The Staff cycle case is overwhelming (5/5 enriched, designer-coordinated, single-artist, sibling-shape ready); one-decision-per-invocation discipline (`bbl-swarm-staggering`) staged the Sliver cohort to triage. Note: the corpus slivers span THREE design eras (Tempest/Stronghold pre-M14 with the old yours-AND-opponents templating; M14/M15 with the controversial yours-only templating; MH3/PLST with the post-2023 partial revert), which makes the cohort node interesting precisely because the templating-era split IS the canonical-evidence anchor — not just 'all slivers tribal,' but 'the sliver design-era story in five cards.' A future Mr. Nodeley pass should propose this when commissioned.

other_candidates_considered.candidate: 1:1 mirror edge between Staff of the Flame Magus and Staff of the Mind Magus (the two M15-only reprints sharing wave-180 trivia pass + same set + same artist)
other_candidates_considered.verdict: Refused. Drawing that one edge would have been a thin solution while the missing-center problem stayed unsolved; ten edge-bullets pointing at an absent center is exactly the Mr. Nodeley trigger. The cycle node subsumes the would-be 1:1.

Staged for future pass. The ktk-clan-banner-cycle node already flagged Ljunggren as 'an unusually load-bearing layer node if commissioned' (five KTK banners under one credit); this Staff cycle adds five more under the same credit (BBL-corpus-printing-verified). That's now two full cycles on one artist's pen in BBL corpus, which makes the artist node a strong cross-cohort-traversal anchor per `bbl-artists-as-counterbalance`. Mr. Nodeley refuses to propose two nodes in one invocation; the artist node is the next dispatch.

next_pass_suggestions: Commission `daniel-ljunggren` artist node — two full BBL-corpus cycles (KTK clan banners + M14 Staff of the Magus) under one credit; cross-cohort traversal anchor.
Commission sliver-tribal cohort node — 5 corpus slivers spanning three design-eras (pre-M14, M14/M15, post-2023); the templating-era split is the canonical anchor, not generic tribal.

Scryfall verification pass on M14-220 (Staff of the Flame Magus original) and M14-221 (Staff of the Mind Magus original) artist field — would confirm or refute the cycle-wide single-artist claim currently provisional in the Staff cycle node body.
Future triviabot precision pass on the five Staff cards' Related-cards bullets to canonicalize against the new cycle node (cosmetic; the bullets are already largely correct).
